dialogue.speaker: god
dialogue.englishText: Arise, go up to Bethel and dwell there. Make an altar there to the God who appeared to you when you fled from your brother Esau

dialogue.speaker: jacob
dialogue.englishText: Put away the foreign gods that are among you and purify yourselves and change your garments

dialogue.speaker: jacob
dialogue.englishText: Then let us arise and go up to Bethel, so that I may make there an altar to the God who answers me in the day of my distress and has been with me wherever I have gone

dialogue.speaker: god
dialogue.englishText: Your name is Jacob; your name shall no longer be called Jacob, but Israel shall be your name

dialogue.speaker: god
dialogue.englishText: I am God Almighty: be fruitful and multiply. A nation and a company of nations shall come from you, and kings shall come from your own body

dialogue.speaker: god
dialogue.englishText: The land that I gave to Abraham and Isaac I will give to you, and I will give the land to your offspring after you

dialogue.speaker: midwife
dialogue.englishText: Do not fear, for you have another son
